description: Analytical data warehouse with full T-SQL support. Optimized for large-scale queries and reporting. Supports cross-database queries with lakehouses in the same workspace. Connect via TDS (SQL Server protocol) from any SQL client.
notes: No definition parts needed for creation
Query via TDS: connection string is <id>.datawarehouse.fabric.microsoft.com
Supports three-part naming for cross-database queries within same workspace
SQL input accepts inline --sql, @file path, or stdin piping
connection-string command resolves the endpoint automatically
